name: WARRIOR MET COAL, INC.
summary: -Environmental and Regulatory Matters-Workers Compensation and Black Lung. Our estimated total black lung liabilities as of December 31, 2025 were $36.1 million (net of the black lung trust). In future years, the DOL could require us to increase the amount of the collateral which could negatively impact our cash flows.
